title: Grab/Navigate toolbar button — active state
capture_instructions: Close-up of the toolbar at the top of the viewport. The Grab/Navigate button (leftmost, hand icon) must be clearly highlighted/active — showing it is the selected tool. Adjacent buttons (Select Points, Annotate, etc.) should be visible but not highlighted. The Queens Campus point cloud should be visible in the viewport background.
ui_state: Grab/Navigate mode active (highlighted in toolbar), Queens Campus loaded

annotations.label: Click here to return to navigation mode
